full_text:
Zhang Ge (Zitai) 張閣 (子臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ge (張閣), styledZitai (子臺). Famed. Supported deposition of Cao Fang. Zhang Ge was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
